title: Summary: Turn 873
content: Memory snapshot of `D:\workspace\KnowledgeBase\knowledgeBase`: Maven project (Java 8, Jackson 2.18.2, H2) with 42 Java files implementing a 3-step pipeline (MediaProcessing → KnowledgeBase → KnowledgeMap). Phase 1 completed: added `category` field to `Notion`, `notionCategoryPrompt` to `InferenceConfig`, and `NotionCategoryInferenceService` with LLM/Noop implementations. Phase 2 (integration into pipeline, UI/export updates) pending.
